glossary.label: Trance
glossary.description: Increases attack and transforms basic skills.

glossary.label: Dark Knight
glossary.description: Increases attack and deals damage at the expense of HP.

glossary.label: DEF
glossary.description: Stat that determines the amount of physical damage taken.

glossary.label: Poison
glossary.description: Takes damage at the start of every turn.

glossary.label: Blind
glossary.description: Makes direct attacks have a chance to miss.

glossary.label: Paladin
glossary.description: Increased defense and possesses and protects allies.

glossary.label: AOE
glossary.description: Damage affecting more than one character simultaneously.

glossary.label: Physical
glossary.description: Damage type increased by the ATK stat and decreased by the DEF stat.

glossary.label: Magical
glossary.description: Damage type increased by the MAG stat and decreased by the RES stat.

glossary.label: SPI
glossary.description: Stat that determines the amount of magical damage received and effectiveness of healing.

glossary.label: White Magic
glossary.description: Supportive magic with healing and protective spells.

glossary.label: White Magic Lv 3
glossary.description: Cure, Dispel, Shell, Protect, Cura, Esuna

glossary.label: White Magic Lv 4
glossary.description: Cure, Dispel, Shell, Protect, Cura, Esuna,  Shellga, Protectga

glossary.label: White Magic Lv 5
glossary.description: Cure, Dispel, Shell, Protect, Cura, Esuna,  Shellga, Protectga, Curaga, Regen

glossary.label: White Magic Lv 6
glossary.description: Cure, Dispel, Shell,  Protect, Cura, Esuna,  Shellga, Protectga, Curaga, Regen, Esunaga, Raise

glossary.label: White Magic Lv 7
glossary.description: Cure, Dispel, Shell, Protect, Cura, Esuna,  Shellga, Protectga, Curaga, Regen, Esunaga, Raise, Curaja, Holy

glossary.label: Regen
glossary.description: Heals for 10% of max HP at the beginning of each turn.

glossary.label: Evasion
glossary.description: Direct damage has a 50% chance to miss.

glossary.label: Basic Attack
glossary.description: Deals moderate physical, direct damage to a front row enemy.

glossary.label: Limit
glossary.description: Stackable buff increases all stats by 5% per stack. Maximum of 5 stacks. Once fully stacked, remove all stacks and gain Limit Break for 1 turn.

glossary.label: Limit Break
glossary.description: Increases all stats by 30% and grants access to specific abilities.

glossary.label: Lion's Might
glossary.description: Increases ATK by 10% for the rest of the battle. Stacks up to 5 times.

glossary.label: Black Magic Lv 2
glossary.description: Fire, Thunder, Blizzard, Aero, Stone, Sleep, Slow, Blind

glossary.label: Black Magic Lv 3
glossary.description: Fire, Thunder, Blizzard, Aero, Stone, Sleep, Slow, Blind, Bio, Osmose, Drain

effect_tag_types.name: dot
effect_tag_types.label: Damage Over Time
effect_tag_types.description: Deals a % of max HP as damage at the start of each turn

effect_tag_types.name: hot
effect_tag_types.label: Heal Over Time
effect_tag_types.description: Heals a % of max HP at the start of each turn

effect_tag_types.name: skip-turn
effect_tag_types.label: Skip Turn
effect_tag_types.description: Target cannot take any actions on their turn

effect_tag_types.name: miss-chance
effect_tag_types.label: Miss Chance
effect_tag_types.description: Outgoing attacks have a chance to miss, dealing no damage and not applying effects

effect_tag_types.name: dodge-chance
effect_tag_types.label: Dodge Chance
effect_tag_types.description: Incoming attacks have a chance to miss this character

effect_tag_types.name: redirect-random
effect_tag_types.label: Redirect Random
effect_tag_types.description: Outgoing direct attacks are redirected to a random character (ally or enemy)

effect_tag_types.name: force-target
effect_tag_types.label: Force Target
effect_tag_types.description: Outgoing direct attacks must target the source of this effect

effect_tag_types.name: block-target
effect_tag_types.label: Block Target
effect_tag_types.description: Cannot attack the source of this effect with direct attacks

effect_tag_types.name: restrict-skills
effect_tag_types.label: Restrict Skills
effect_tag_types.description: Limits which skill types can be used

effect_tag_types.name: set-stat
effect_tag_types.label: Set Stat
effect_tag_types.description: Overrides a stat to a fixed value instead of percentage modifier

effect_tag_types.name: invert-healing
effect_tag_types.label: Invert Healing
effect_tag_types.description: Healing effects deal damage instead

effect_tag_types.name: removed-on-damage
effect_tag_types.label: Removed on Damage
effect_tag_types.description: This status is removed when the character takes damage

effect_tag_types.name: cover
effect_tag_types.label: Cover
effect_tag_types.description: Takes damage in place of allies whose HP is below the threshold

effect_tag_types.name: counter
effect_tag_types.label: Counter
effect_tag_types.description: When taking damage, automatically counter-attacks the source with the character's basic attack

effect_tag_types.name: restrict-switch
effect_tag_types.label: Restrict Switch
effect_tag_types.description: Prevents the affected character from using the Switch command on their turn

effect_tag_types.name: faster-target-bonus
effect_tag_types.label: Faster Target Bonus
effect_tag_types.description: While equipped, deals bonus damage to targets with lower SPD than the attacker

effect_tag_types.name: fire-imbue
effect_tag_types.label: Fire Imbue
effect_tag_types.description: Grants the Fire element to the attacker's physical attacks. Mutually exclusive with other imbues.

effect_tag_types.name: ice-imbue
effect_tag_types.label: Ice Imbue
effect_tag_types.description: Grants the Ice element to the attacker's physical attacks. Mutually exclusive with other imbues.

effect_tag_types.name: thunder-imbue
effect_tag_types.label: Thunder Imbue
effect_tag_types.description: Grants the Thunder element to the attacker's physical attacks. Mutually exclusive with other imbues.

effect_tag_types.name: healing-received
effect_tag_types.label: Healing Received
effect_tag_types.description: Modifies incoming healing on the affected character. Negative values reduce healing, positive values amplify it.

effect_tag_types.name: multi-strike
effect_tag_types.label: Multi-Strike
effect_tag_types.description: When the holder uses the specified skill, it triggers multiple times against the same target with independent miss/dodge/cover rolls per hit.

effect_tag_types.name: guaranteed-hit
effect_tag_types.label: Guaranteed Hit
effect_tag_types.description: Attacks from the holder bypass miss-chance, dodge-chance, and cover redirect.

effect_tag_types.name: invincible
effect_tag_types.label: Invincible
effect_tag_types.description: The holder takes no damage from any source. Effects (debuffs, movements, etc.) from attacks still apply normally — only the damage number is zeroed out.

effect_tag_types.name: auto-revive
effect_tag_types.label: Auto-Revive
effect_tag_types.description: When the holder is defeated, they are automatically revived with a percentage of their max HP. The buff is consumed on trigger.

effect_tag_types.name: healing-dealt
effect_tag_types.label: Healing Dealt
effect_tag_types.description: Modifies outgoing healing from the holder. Positive values amplify heals cast by this character.

effect_tag_types.name: template-ignore-spirit
effect_tag_types.label: Template Ignore Spirit
effect_tag_types.description: Attacks from the specified templates ignore a percentage of the target's SPI. Applied via while-equipped passive.
